title: Login Screen - Verify country code selector functionality
description: Tests the interaction with the country code dropdown.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Verify the default country code is '+91'.
2. Tap on the country code selector.
3. Verify a dropdown or a new screen appears with a list of country codes.

expected_result: The country code selector is interactive and displays a list of options when tapped.
